mapper.select:
WITH /* 기준일 1회 계산 */ today AS ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS D FROM DUAL ), DEPT_TBL AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'WBSCODE01' AS WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, '수주확정' AS FULL_NM, '수' AS DEPT_NM, 'S01' AS DEPT_ID, 'GUN30' AS MNG_DEPT FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE02', '원가PFU', '원', 'S02', 'GUN30' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE03', '설계', '설', 'S03', 'GUN40' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE17', '모델링', '모', 'S04', 'TRN50' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE04', '구매', '구', 'S05', 'TRN50' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE18', '샘플공급', '샘', 'S06', 'GUN30' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE05', '기계조립', '기', 'S07', 'GUN60' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE06', '전기', '전', 'S08', 'TRN50' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE07', '자체시운전', '자', 'S09', 'GUN30' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE16', '외부검수', '외', 'S10', 'GUN60' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE09', '고객검수', '고', 'S11', 'GUN30' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE10', '포장', '포', 'S12', 'GUN30' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE11', '출고', '출', 'S13', 'GUN30' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE12', '도착', '도', 'S14', 'GUN30' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE13', '설치출발', '발', 'S15', 'GUN30' FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 'WBSCODE14', '설치복귀', '귀', 'S16', 'GUN30' FROM DUAL ) T LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT substr(VIEW_DEPT_ID,1,5) VIEW_DEPT_ID, MNG_ID AS TEAM_MNG_ID FROM TB_CM06M01 WHERE TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND MNG_ID IS NOT NULL ) M ON M.VIEW_DEPT_ID = T.MNG_DEPT ), src AS ( SELECT W.CO_CD, W.SALES_CD, D.DEPT_ID, D.DEPT_NM, D.FULL_NM, D.TEAM_MNG_ID, W.WBS_PLANS_DT, W.WBS_PLANE_DT, W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, W.FILE_TRGT_KEY, W.CLOSE_YN AS WBS_CLOSE_YN, W.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID, C.NAME AS WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID_NM, W.VER_NO FROM TB_WB22M01 W LEFT JOIN DEPT_TBL D ON D.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID = W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM06M01 C ON C.ID = W.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID WHERE W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = 'WBSCODE'
AND W.SALES_CD IN
#{cd}
AND W.SALES_CD LIKE '%' || #{salesCd} || '%'
AND W.CO_CD = #{coCd} AND W.WBS_PLANS_DT IS NOT NULL AND W.WBS_PLANE_DT IS NOT NULL AND D.DEPT_ID IS NOT NULL ), s0 AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */ DISTINCT CO_CD, SALES_CD FROM src WHERE 1 = 1
AND src.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID_NM LIKE '%' || #{wbsPlanMngIdNm} || '%'
) ,w0 AS ( SELECT S0.CO_CD, S0.SALES_CD, COUNT(W.FILE_TRGT_KEY) AS problem_count, SUM(CASE WHEN W.REQ_NO IS NULL AND W.ISS_STS != 'ISSSTS03' THEN 1 WHEN Q.REQ_ST != 'REQST03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS problem_uncomplete FROM s0 S0 JOIN TB_WB24M02 W ON W.CO_CD = S0.CO_CD AND W.SALES_CD = S0.SALES_CD JOIN TB_QM01M01 Q ON Q.REQ_NO = W.REQ_NO GROUP BY S0.CO_CD, S0.SALES_CD ), wb21_latest AS ( SELECT CO_CD, SALES_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, WBS_REMARK, CLOSE_YN, VER_NO, SMRIZE_ID FROM ( SELECT W.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY W.SJ_NO ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(W.VER_NO) DESC ) AS RN FROM TB_WB21M01 W ) WHERE RN = 1 ), /* sales는 1회만 집계 */ sales AS ( SELECT S0.CO_CD, S0.SALES_CD, MAX(C.EQP_NM) AS EQP_NM, MAX(C.ORDRS_NO) AS ORDRS_NO, MAX(M.ORDRS_CLNT_CD) AS ORDRS_CLNT_CD, MAX(B.CLNT_NM) AS CLNT_NM, MAX(M.CLNT_PJT) AS CLNT_PJT, FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(MAX(M.CLNT_PJT)) AS CLNT_PJT_NM, MAX(W.FILE_TRGT_KEY) AS SJ_FILE_TRGT_KEY, MAX(W.WBS_REMARK) AS WBS_REMARK, MAX(NVL(W.CLOSE_YN,'N')) AS CLOSE_YN, MAX(W.SMRIZE_ID) AS SMRIZE_ID, MAX(W.VER_NO) AS SJ_VER_NO FROM s0 S0 JOIN TB_CR02D02 C ON C.CO_CD = S0.CO_CD AND C.SALES_CD = S0.SALES_CD JOIN TB_CR02M01 M ON M.ORDRS_NO = C.ORDRS_NO JOIN TB_BM02M01 B ON B.CLNT_CD = M.ORDRS_CLNT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CO_CD, SALES_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, WBS_REMARK, CLOSE_YN , VER_NO, SMRIZE_ID FROM TB_WB21M01 W WHERE W.VER_NO = (SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(VER_NO)) FROM TB_WB21M01 P1 WHERE P1.SJ_NO = W.SJ_NO) ) W ON W.CO_CD = S0.CO_CD AND W.SALES_CD = S0.SALES_CD GROUP BY S0.CO_CD, S0.SALES_CD ), base_lag AS ( SELECT s.*, LAG(DEPT_ID) OVER ( PARTITION BY CO_CD, SALES_CD ORDER BY WBS_PLANS_DT, WBS_PLANE_DT, DEPT_ID, WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, FILE_TRGT_KEY ) AS PREV_DEPT_ID FROM src s ), base_run AS ( SELECT b.*, SUM( CASE WHEN b.PREV_DEPT_ID = b.DEPT_ID THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) OVER ( PARTITION BY CO_CD, SALES_CD ORDER BY WBS_PLANS_DT, WBS_PLANE_DT, DEPT_ID, WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID ) AS RUN_ID FROM base_lag b ), /* 여기서 먼저 run 단위로 집계(최종 GROUP BY 문제 제거) */ final_base AS ( SELECT CO_CD, SALES_CD, RUN_ID, DEPT_ID, MAX(DEPT_NM) AS DEPT_NM, MAX(FULL_NM) AS FULL_NM, MAX(TEAM_MNG_ID) AS TEAM_MNG_ID, MIN(WBS_PLANS_DT) AS WBS_PLANS_DT_FM, MAX(WBS_PLANE_DT) AS WBS_PLANE_DT_FM, MAX(FILE_TRGT_KEY) AS FILE_TRGT_KEY, MAX(WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID) AS WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, MAX(WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID) AS WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID, MAX(WBS_CLOSE_YN) AS WBS_CLOSE_YN, --일정마감여부 MAX(VER_NO) AS PLAN_VER_NO FROM base_run GROUP BY CO_CD, SALES_CD, RUN_ID, DEPT_ID ), sales_range AS ( SELECT CO_CD, SALES_CD, MIN(WBS_PLANS_DT_FM) AS SALES_START, MAX(WBS_PLANE_DT_FM) AS SALES_END FROM final_base GROUP BY CO_CD, SALES_CD ) , src_act AS ( SELECT A.CO_CD, A.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND, A.SALES_CD, MAX(A.WBS_RSLTS_ID) AS WBS_RSLTS_ID, AVG(A.WBS_RSLTS_RATE) AS WBS_RSLTS_RATE, SUM(A.WBS_RSLTS_MH) AS WBS_RSLTS_MH, MAX(A.WBS_RSLTS_CNTS) AS WBS_RSLTS_CNTS, MIN(A.WBS_RSLTSS_DT) AS WBS_RSLTSS_DT, MAX(A.WBS_RSLTSE_DT) AS WBS_RSLTSE_DT, MAX(A.CLOSE_YN) AS CLOSE_YN, SUM(A.DAYCNT) AS DAYCNT FROM TB_WB23M01 A JOIN s0 ON s0.CO_CD = A.CO_CD AND s0.SALES_CD = A.SALES_CD WHERE A.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND != 'WBSCODE' GROUP BY A.CO_CD, A.SALES_CD, A.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND ), WB AS ( /*+ MATERIALIZE */ SELECT W.CO_CD, W.VER_NO, W.SALES_CD, W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, W.WBS_PLANS_DT, W.WBS_PLANE_DT FROM TB_WB22M01 W JOIN s0 ON s0.CO_CD = W.CO_CD AND s0.SALES_CD = W.SALES_CD WHERE W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = 'WBSCODE' AND W.WBS_PLANS_DT IS NOT NULL ) ,WBK AS ( /*+ MATERIALIZE */ SELECT DISTINCT CO_CD, VER_NO, SALES_CD, WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID FROM WB ) , plan AS ( SELECT W.CO_CD, W.SALES_CD, W.WBS_PLANS_DT, W.WBS_PLANE_DT, W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, W.VER_NO, WR.WBS_RSLTS_NO, WR.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, WR.WBS_RSLTS_RATE, WR.WBS_RSLTS_MH, WR.WBS_RSLTSS_DT, WR.WBS_RSLTSE_DT, WR.CLOSE_YN, CASE WHEN NVL(WR.CLOSE_YN, 'N') = 'Y' THEN '0' ELSE '1' END UN_COMPLETED FROM WB W LEFT JOIN TB_WB23M01 WR ON WR.CO_CD = W.CO_CD AND WR.SALES_CD = W.SALES_CD AND WR.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID CROSS JOIN today T WHERE W.CO_CD = 'GUN' AND W.WBS_PLANE_DT < T.D ) , unRslt AS ( SELECT P.CO_CD, P.SALES_CD, MIN(P.WBS_PLANS_DT) AS WBS_PLANS_DT, MAX(P.WBS_PLANE_DT) AS WBS_PLANE_DT, SUM(P.UN_COMPLETED) AS UN_COMPLETED FROM plan P GROUP BY P.CO_CD, P.SALES_CD HAVING SUM(P.UN_COMPLETED) > 0 ) SELECT F.CO_CD, F.SALES_CD, F.DEPT_ID, F.DEPT_NM, F.FULL_NM, F.TEAM_MNG_ID, TO_CHAR(F.WBS_PLANS_DT_FM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WBS_PLANS_DT_FM, TO_CHAR(F.WBS_PLANE_DT_FM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WBS_PLANE_DT_FM, F.WBS_CLOSE_YN, --일정마감여부 F.PLAN_VER_NO, F.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, C5.CODE_NM AS WBS_PLAN_CODE_NM, S.EQP_NM, S.ORDRS_NO, S.ORDRS_CLNT_CD, S.CLNT_NM, S.CLNT_PJT, S.CLNT_PJT_NM, F.FILE_TRGT_KEY, S.SJ_FILE_TRGT_KEY, --과제마스터키 S.CLOSE_YN, --과제마감여부 S.WBS_REMARK, --WBS 특이사항 S.SMRIZE_ID, S.SJ_VER_NO, F.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID, C.NAME AS WBS_PLAN_MNG_NM, CASE -- WHEN ST.HOLD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'HOLD' WHEN ST.CLOSE_YN = 'Y' OR NVL(ST.WBS_RSLTS_RATE,0) >= 100 THEN 'DONE' WHEN NVL(ST.WBS_RSLTS_RATE,0) = 0 THEN 'PLN' ELSE 'ING' END AS STATUS, --진행상태 PLN ING DONE HOLD ST.CLOSE_YN AS ACT_CLOSE_YN, NVL(ST.WBS_RSLTS_RATE, 0) AS ACT_PROG, --진행율 TO_CHAR(ST.WBS_RSLTSS_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ACT_ST, --실적 시작일 TO_CHAR(ST.WBS_RSLTSE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ACT_END, --실적 시작일 ST.WBS_RSLTS_CNTS AS MEMO, --메모 NVL(W0.PROBLEM_COUNT, 0) AS PROBLEM_COUNT, NVL(W0.PROBLEM_UNCOMPLETE, 0) AS PROBLEM_UNCOMPLETE,PROBLEM_UNCOMPLETE, NVL(UN.UN_COMPLETED, 0) AS UN_COMPLETED FROM final_base F JOIN sales S ON S.CO_CD = F.CO_CD AND S.SALES_CD = F.SALES_CD JOIN sales_range R ON R.CO_CD = F.CO_CD AND R.SALES_CD = F.SALES_CD CROSS JOIN today T LEFT JOIN w0 W0 ON W0.CO_CD = F.CO_CD AND W0.SALES_CD = F.SALES_CD LEFT JOIN unRslt UN ON UN.CO_CD = F.CO_CD AND UN.SALES_CD = F.SALES_CD LEFT JOIN TB_CM06M01 C ON C.ID = F.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM05M01 C5 ON C5.CODE_ID = F.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID LEFT JOIN src_act ST ON ST.CO_CD = F.CO_CD AND ST.SALES_CD = F.SALES_CD AND ST.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = F.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND R.SALES_START < T.D AND R.SALES_END > T.D
AND F.SALES_CD LIKE '%' || #{salesCd} || '%'
AND S.CLNT_NM LIKE '%' || #{ordrsClntNm} || '%'
AND S.CLNT_PJT = #{clntPjt}
ORDER BY F.CO_CD, F.SALES_CD, F.WBS_PLANS_DT_FM, F.DEPT_ID

SELECT CO_CD , SALES_CD , DESIGN_MNG , TO_CHAR(DELIVER_DAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DELIVER_DAY , MODEL_CLNT_NM , TO_CHAR(MODEL_COMP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MODEL_COMP_DT , OUT_CLNT_NM , TO_CHAR(OUT_COMP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OUT_COMP_DT , CAM_CLNT_NM , TO_CHAR(CAM_COMP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CAM_COMP_DT , MACHIN_MNG_NM , MM_MEMO , DWG_MEMO , PRD_MEMO , SALES_MEMO , PM_MEMO , REMARK , CREAT_ID , CREAT_PGM , TO_CHAR(CREAT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREAT_DTTM , UDT_ID , UDT_PGM , TO_CHAR(UDT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UDT_DTTM FROM TB_WB22D02 WHERE CO_CD = #{coCd} AND SALES_CD = #{salesCd}

WITH /* 기준일 1회 계산 */ today AS ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS D FROM DUAL ), src AS ( SELECT W.CO_CD, W.SALES_CD, MIN(W.WBS_PLANS_DT) AS WBS_PLANS_DT_FM, MAX(W.WBS_PLANE_DT) AS WBS_PLANE_DT_FM, MAX(W.VER_NO) AS PLAN_VER_NO, MAX(W.CLOSE_YN) AS PLAN_CLOSE_YN FROM TB_WB22M01 W CROSS JOIN today T WHERE W.CO_CD = 'GUN' AND W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = 'WBSCODE' AND W.WBS_PLANS_DT IS NOT NULL AND W.WBS_PLANE_DT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY W.CO_CD, W.SALES_CD, T.D
HAVING MIN(W.WBS_PLANS_DT) <= T.D AND MAX(W.WBS_PLANE_DT) >= T.D
HAVING W.SALES_CD LIKE '%' || #{salesCd} || '%'
) , plan AS ( SELECT W.CO_CD, W.SALES_CD, W.WBS_PLANS_DT, W.WBS_PLANE_DT, W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, W.VER_NO, WR.WBS_RSLTS_NO, WR.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, WR.WBS_RSLTS_RATE, WR.WBS_RSLTS_MH, WR.WBS_RSLTSS_DT, WR.WBS_RSLTSE_DT, WR.CLOSE_YN, CASE WHEN NVL(WR.CLOSE_YN, 'N') = 'Y' THEN '0' ELSE '1' END UN_COMPLETED FROM TB_WB22M01 W JOIN src S ON W.CO_CD = S.CO_CD AND W.SALES_CD = S.SALES_CD LEFT JOIN TB_WB23M01 WR ON WR.CO_CD = W.CO_CD AND WR.SALES_CD = W.SALES_CD AND WR.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID CROSS JOIN today T WHERE W.CO_CD = 'GUN' AND W.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = 'WBSCODE' AND W.WBS_PLANS_DT IS NOT NULL AND W.WBS_PLANE_DT IS NOT NULL AND W.WBS_PLANE_DT < T.D ) , unRslt AS ( SELECT P.CO_CD, P.SALES_CD, MIN(P.WBS_PLANS_DT) AS WBS_PLANS_DT, MAX(P.WBS_PLANE_DT) AS WBS_PLANE_DT, SUM(P.UN_COMPLETED) AS UN_COMPLETED FROM plan P GROUP BY P.CO_CD, P.SALES_CD HAVING SUM(P.UN_COMPLETED) > 0 ) , s0 AS ( SELECT S.CO_CD , S.SALES_CD , C.EQP_NM , B.CLNT_NM AS CLNT_NM , M.CLNT_PJT AS CLNT_PJT , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(M.CLNT_PJT) AS CLNT_PJT_NM FROM src S JOIN TB_CR02D02 C ON C.CO_CD = S.CO_CD AND C.SALES_CD = S.SALES_CD JOIN TB_CR02M01 M ON M.ORDRS_NO = C.ORDRS_NO JOIN TB_BM02M01 B ON B.CLNT_CD = M.ORDRS_CLNT_CD ) ,w0 AS ( SELECT S0.CO_CD, S0.SALES_CD, COUNT(W.FILE_TRGT_KEY) AS problem_count, SUM(CASE WHEN W.REQ_NO IS NULL AND W.ISS_STS != 'ISSSTS03' THEN 1 WHEN Q.REQ_ST != 'REQST03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS problem_uncomplete FROM s0 S0 JOIN TB_WB24M02 W ON W.CO_CD = S0.CO_CD AND W.SALES_CD = S0.SALES_CD JOIN TB_QM01M01 Q ON Q.REQ_NO = W.REQ_NO GROUP BY S0.CO_CD, S0.SALES_CD ) SELECT R.CO_CD , R.SALES_CD , R.PLAN_CLOSE_YN , S0.EQP_NM , S0.CLNT_NM AS CLNT_NM , S0.CLNT_PJT AS CLNT_PJT , S0.CLNT_PJT_NM , R.WBS_PLANS_DT_FM , R.WBS_PLANE_DT_FM , F.DESIGN_MNG , TO_CHAR(F.DELIVER_DAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DELIVER_DAY , F.MODEL_CLNT_NM , TO_CHAR(F.MODEL_COMP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MODEL_COMP_DT , F.OUT_CLNT_NM , TO_CHAR(F.OUT_COMP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OUT_COMP_DT , F.CAM_CLNT_NM , TO_CHAR(F.CAM_COMP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CAM_COMP_DT , F.MACHIN_MNG_NM , F.MM_MEMO , F.DWG_MEMO , F.PRD_MEMO , F.SALES_MEMO , F.PM_MEMO , F.REMARK , F.CREAT_ID , F.CREAT_PGM , TO_CHAR(F.CREAT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREAT_DTTM , F.UDT_ID , F.UDT_PGM , TO_CHAR(F.UDT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UDT_DTTM , NVL(W0.problem_count, 0) AS problem_count , NVL(W0.problem_uncomplete, 0) AS problem_uncomplete , NVL(UN.UN_COMPLETED, 0) AS UN_COMPLETED FROM src R LEFT JOIN TB_WB22D02 F ON R.CO_CD = F.CO_CD AND R.SALES_CD = F.SALES_CD JOIN S0 ON S0.CO_CD = R.CO_CD AND S0.SALES_CD = R.SALES_CD LEFT JOIN W0 ON W0.CO_CD = R.CO_CD AND W0.SALES_CD = R.SALES_CD LEFT JOIN unRslt UN ON UN.CO_CD = R.CO_CD AND UN.SALES_CD = R.SALES_CD CROSS JOIN today T WHERE R.CO_CD = 'GUN'
AND R.WBS_PLANS_DT_FM <= T.D AND R.WBS_PLANE_DT_FM >= T.D
AND R.SALES_CD LIKE '%' || #{salesCd} || '%'
AND S0.CLNT_NM LIKE '%' || #{ordrsClntNm} || '%'
AND S0.CLNT_PJT = #{clntPjt}
ORDER BY R.CO_CD, R.SALES_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_WB22M01_HIST SELECT FILE_TRGT_KEY, CO_CD, WBS_PLAN_NO, WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND, WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, WBS_PLAN_CODE_NM, VER_NO, SALES_CD, SEQ, WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID, WBS_PLANS_DT, WBS_PLANE_DT, DAYCNT, WBS_PLAN_STS_CODE_ID, LOCK_YN, CLOSE_YN, CLOSE_ID, CLOSE_DTTM, EXPECT_MH, CHG_REQ_STR_DT, CHG_REQ_END_DT, CHG_REASON, CHG_REQ_USER_ID, CHG_REQ_STATUS, CHG_REQ_APPLY_DT, VER_UP_REASON, CREAT_ID, CREAT_PGM, CREAT_DTTM, UDT_ID, UDT_PGM, UDT_DTTM FROM TB_WB22M01 WHERE CO_CD = #{coCd} AND SALES_CD = #{salesCd} AND CLOSE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TB_WB23M01 A USING ( SELECT FILE_TRGT_KEY, CO_CD, WBS_PLAN_NO AS WBS_RSLTS_NO, WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND, WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, SALES_CD, WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID AS WBS_RSLTS_ID FROM TB_WB22M01 WHERE CO_CD = #{coCd} AND SALES_CD = #{salesCd} AND WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID = #{wbsPlanCodeId} AND WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = 'WBSCODE' ) B ON (A.CO_CD = B.CO_CD AND A.SALES_CD = B.SALES_CD AND A.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID = B.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID AND A.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = B.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET WBS_RSLTSS_DT = TRUNC(SYSDATE), CLOSE_YN = #{actCloseYn}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FILE_TRGT_KEY, CO_CD, WBS_RSLTS_NO, WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND, WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, SALES_CD, WBS_RSLTS_ID, WBS_RSLTSS_DT, WBS_RSLTS_RATE, LOCK_YN, CLOSE_YN, CREAT_ID, CREAT_PGM, CREAT_DTTM) VALUES (B.FILE_TRGT_KEY, B.CO_CD, B.WBS_RSLTS_NO, B.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND, B.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, B.SALES_CD, B.WBS_RSLTS_ID, TRUNC(SYSDATE), 1, 'N', #{actCloseYn}, #{userId}, #{pgmId}, SYSDATE)

MERGE INTO TB_WB23M01 A USING ( SELECT #{coCd} AS CO_CD, #{salesCd} AS SALES_CD, #{wbsPlanCodeKind} AS WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.CO_CD = B.CO_CD AND A.SALES_CD = B.SALES_CD AND A.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = B.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET WBS_RSLTSS_DT = #{wbsRsltssDt}, WBS_RSLTSE_DT = #{wbsRsltseDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WBS_PLAN_MH = #{wbsPlanMh}, WBS_RSLTS_MH = #{wbsRsltsMh}, WBS_RSLTS_RATE = #{wbsRsltsRate}, DAYCNT = #{daycnt}, CLOSE_YN = #{actCloseYn}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE NVL(CLOSE_YN, 'N') != 'Y' -- 이미 마감된 건 업데이트 제외 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FILE_TRGT_KEY, CO_CD, WBS_RSLTS_NO, WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND, WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, SALES_CD, DAYCNT, WBS_RSLTS_ID, WBS_RSLTSS_DT, WBS_RSLTSE_DT, WBS_PLAN_MH, WBS_RSLTS_MH, WBS_RSLTS_RATE, LOCK_YN, CLOSE_YN, CREAT_ID, CREAT_PGM, CREAT_DTTM) VALUES (#{rsltsFileTrgtKey}, #{coCd}, #{wbsPlanNo}, #{wbsPlanCodeKind}, #{wbsPlanCodeId}, #{salesCd}, #{daycnt}, #{wbsPlanMngId}, #{wbsRsltssDt}, #{wbsRsltseDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wbsPlanMh}, #{wbsRsltsMh}, #{wbsRsltsRate}, 'N', #{actCloseYn}, #{userId}, #{pgmId}, SYSDATE)

MERGE INTO TB_WB22M01 A USING ( SELECT #{coCd} AS CO_CD, #{salesCd} AS SALES_CD, #{wbsPlanCodeKind} AS WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.CO_CD = B.CO_CD AND A.SALES_CD = B.SALES_CD AND A.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND = B.WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET WBS_PLAN_CODE_NM = #{wbsPlanCodeNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID = #{wbsPlanMngId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WBS_PLANS_DT = #{wbsPlansDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WBS_PLANE_DT = #{wbsPlaneDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DAYCNT = #{daycnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXPECT_MH = #{expectMh, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WBS_PLAN_STS_CODE_ID = #{wbsPlanStsCodeId}, UDT_ID = #{creatId}, UDT_PGM = #{creatPgm}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE, VER_UP_REASON = #{verUpReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REVISED_FINISH_DT = #{revisedFinishDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE NVL(CLOSE_YN, 'N') != 'Y' -- 이미 마감된 건 업데이트 제외 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( FILE_TRGT_KEY, CO_CD, WBS_PLAN_NO, WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND, WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID, WBS_PLAN_CODE_NM, SALES_CD, VER_NO, SEQ, WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID, WBS_PLANS_DT, WBS_PLANE_DT, DAYCNT, EXPECT_MH, WBS_PLAN_STS_CODE_ID, CLOSE_YN, CREAT_ID, CREAT_PGM, CREAT_DTTM, VER_UP_REASON, REVISED_FINISH_DT ) VALUES ( #{planFileTrgtKey}, #{coCd}, #{wbsPlanNo}, #{wbsPlanCodeKind}, #{wbsPlanCodeId}, #{wbsPlanCodeNm}, #{salesCd}, #{verNo}, 1, #{wbsPlanMngId}, #{wbsPlansDt}, #{wbsPlaneDt}, #{daycnt}, #{expectMh, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wbsPlanStsCodeId}, 'Y', #{creatId}, #{creatPgm}, SYSDATE, #{verUpReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{revisedFinishDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
